sub_title: T-Roc Cabriolet R-Line 1.5 TSI 150PS 7-speed DSG 2 Door

delers.name: Esplanade Volkswagen Isle of W ight

Standard equipment.Interior equipment: Dynamic road sign display,Stainless steel pedals,Carpet mats, front and rear,Laminated safety glass windshield, heat insulating,Electric windows, front,Decorative inserts "Piano Black" for dashboard, centre console and front door trim panels,Sun visors with illuminated vanity mirrors,Unique 'R-Line' door sill protectors,`Air Care Climatronic` (2-zone) air conditioning system,12V socket in centre console
Standard equipment.Exterior equipment: 'R-Line' body-coloured bumpers,Canvas convertible top, power-operated,Exterior mirrors: aspherical on driver side, convex on front passenger side,Body-coloured exterior mirror housings and door handles,Remote electrically foldable door mirrors, puddle lights and reverse activated passenger's door mirror,Park assist including parking sensors (front & rear),LED Plus headlamps with LED separate daytime running light,Dark Red LED rear combination lamps
Standard equipment.Steering wheels: Leather-wrapped sports multi-function steering wheel, heated, with tiptronic
Standard equipment.Seats: Inserts of front seats and outer rear seats in ArtVelours "Titan" Black,Sports comfort seats in front,Easy entry backrest release,Split folding rear seat backrests 50:50, rear bench seat fixed,Driver's and front passenger's seat height adjustment,Rear head restraints,Heated front seats,Safety-optimised front head restraints,Front centre armrest,Power-adjustable lumbar support in front seats
Standard equipment.Infotainment: e-Sim card for online connectivity,Digital radio reception (DAB),2 USB-C ports in the front, 2 USB-C charging sockets on the centre console in rear, charging capacity up to 45 W,Standard navigation system with media and internet package,Radio,6 speakers,Digital Cockpit Pro,Wireless App-Connect,Mobile phone interface with inductive charging feature
Standard equipment.Technology and safety: Advanced driver attention & drowsiness monitor,'e-call' Emergency call service,Multifunction front facing camera for distance control,Interior ambient lighting and surround lighting,Electronic parking brake,Predictive pedestrian protection,Electronic Stability Control (ESC) inc EDL (Electronic Differential Lock) and ASR (Traction Control),Ambient lighting with logo projection,Driving profile selection,ISOFIX child seat preparation,Central locking system with SAFELOCK, radio remote control and 2 remote  control folding keys,Driver and front passenger airbag with f ront passenger airbag deactivation,Side airbag/thorax airbag system, for front passengers,Lane Assist, Traffic Jam Assist and Emergency Assist,Front Assist - Autonomous Emergency Braking (for Adaptive Cruise Control ACC up to  130 mph),Lane change system side assist,High Beam Assist, automatic sensing for switching between dipped and main beam,Rain sensor,Dynamic headlight range control,Rear fog light on one side, reversing light on both sides,Adaptive cruise control and speed limiter,Light mode for poor weather- rain, fog or snow,Two-tone horn,Automatic headlight control with LED separate daytime running light with Coming home and Leaving home feature
Standard equipment.Engine/transmission: Emission standard, WLTP3 M1, N1-I//EU6EB,Start-stop system with battery  regeneration (recuperation - energy recovery during braking)
Standard equipment.other: LED Performance headlights,Navigation system "Discover Pro" incl. Streaming & Internet,Anti-theft alarm system, interior monitoring, backup horn, and towing protection,Winter pack,Driver Assistance package,'We Connect' and 'We Connect Plus' functionality

Additional equipment.other: Alloy wheels 18" 'Nevada' Black diamond-turned surface,Steel space and weight saving spare wheel
